title: Creator & Press Red Carpet Outreach Pipeline
canonical_topic: Cooperative-native outreach pipeline connecting the Content Command Center to creators and press through 28 seeded Instagram picks, universal invite codes resolving to 9 walkthrough types, MoneyPenny outbound queue with full lifecycle, and auto-generated personalized cue cards for every Opening Gambit recipient.
composing_primitives: Creator scouting pipeline seeding social media creators as undrafted picks
Universal invite code system resolving to 9 distinct walkthrough types for 100+ recipients
MoneyPenny outbound queue with queued→approved→sent lifecycle wired to content review dashboard
Auto-generated personalized cue card with QR preview and attribution tracking
PressJunket page with 15/45/90-minute guided tours

title: Guided Tour Content Consumption System
canonical_topic: Three-mode cooperative content navigation system (Topic Focus, Category Browse, Guided Tour) with real-time adaptive detail level switching across six depths, Return Beacon save points, and a user annotation overlay feeding an AI-categorized Librarian Guild processing pipeline.
composing_primitives: Three-mode navigation engine (Topic Focus chain, Category Browse, auto-advancing Guided Tour with skip/save/exit)
Adaptive three-position detail level switcher (Skipping Stones/Wading In/Deep Dive mapped to 6-depth Crow's Nest)
Return Beacon persistent save points with session resume capability
Content Notes Overlay with dual-path persistence (personal save vs. cooperative submission)
MoneyPenny AI categorization routing notes to 7 Section Librarians by domain

title: Interactive Feedback Tutorial with Sequential Tracking
canonical_topic: First-visit cooperative onboarding tutorial teaching feedback-as-civic-duty through three guided interactive steps on live content, confirming each submission with a sequentially numbered 8-digit record routed through AI categorization to a human Librarian Guild.
composing_primitives: Three-step interactive first-visit tutorial overlay on live LRH Fable content
User must physically click and interact with live content (not simulated)
Sequential 8-digit submission numbering visible to user (makes feedback feel permanent)
MoneyPenny AI categorization feeding into Librarian Guild domain routing
Persistent dismissal preference checkbox preventing repeat display

title: Trail Map Navigation + Grand Tour Packages + Marks Milestone Prize Panel
canonical_topic: Cooperative journey visualization as a treasure-map trail with customizable Trail Markers, themed Grand Tour packages earning Marks on completion, and a real-time milestone celebration system transforming at 100 Marks into a three-tab Prize Panel presenting spending, capability, and earning paths for cooperative business launch.
composing_primitives: Visual treasure-map trail with filled/outlined milestone indicators and customizable Trail Marker icons
Themed Grand Tour Packages (Fable Trail, Maker's Walk, Money Map, Founder's Path) earning Marks
Real-time Marks milestone listener across thresholds (1, 10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 250, 500, 1000)
Three-Tab Prize Panel: What Can I Get / What Can I Do / How Can I Make Money (16+ actionable cards)
Contextual card rotation on spending tab based on member's primary earning categories

title: Oar Slots: Visual Cooperative Crew Formation with Earning Comparison
canonical_topic: Visual cooperative crew formation interface using a canoe-to-ship metaphor that displays a member's current role alongside empty oar slots representing unfilled cooperative positions, with side-by-side solo vs. crew earning projections, Ship Templates per initiative, and integrated cue card recruitment CTAs.
composing_primitives: Canoe-to-ship visual metaphor for solo (~$100/mo) vs. cooperative (~$500-800/mo) earnings
Per-oar role projections with 'Why More?' multiplier explanation
Ship Templates mapped to cooperative initiatives (Let's Make Dinner 6 oars, etc.)
Integrated cue card recruitment generating pre-filled invitations to fill specific empty slots
Multi-role self-enrollment enabling one member to occupy multiple compatible positions

title: Elbow Grease Effort Scale + Printable Cue Card Business Cards
canonical_topic: Ten-level cooperative effort classification system with flippable oil-can badge UI integrated with X-Ray Goggles inspection, paired with a printable business-card generator producing QR-encoded Red Carpet verification cards that earn Seeder Marks on successful business onboarding.
composing_primitives: 10-level Elbow Grease scale (Browse to Founder) with Marks earning ranges per level
Flippable badge: front shows level/description, back shows process and solo vs. crew earnings
X-Ray Goggles integration displaying Elbow Grease badges on every discoverable element
Printable 3.5×2 cue card generator encoding Red Carpet URL with member+business attribution
Seeder Marks reward triggered when scanned business completes Red Carpet onboarding

title: Recovered Innovations #2125-#2128 from Knight Chat Transcripts
canonical_topic: Four recovered innovations: an interactive Golden Key Codebreaker puzzle overlay reusing Notes architecture with mode-switching, a database-driven dynamic Red Carpet recipient registry with GIN-indexed arrays, a cooperative status economics framework inverting Veblen dynamics, and a dual-render publication system toggling between academic and member content views.
composing_primitives: Golden Key Codebreaker overlay with keyword validation against key_submissions table and feather rewards
Dynamic red_carpet_registry with GIN-indexed email/domain arrays and JSONB walkthrough config
Cooperative Status Economics: affordability as status signal inverting Veblen dynamics
Dual-Render Publication System toggling Academic (serif/citation/PDF) vs Member (beacons/notes/puzzles) views
NotesOverlayContext mode-switching architecture shared by Codebreaker and Notes overlays

title: AI Nanny Verification Protocol
canonical_topic: Automated multi-layer verification system for multi-agent AI development combining a binary codebase health check, a five-type AI hallucination taxonomy, a dual-synthesis Red Queen protocol requiring architecture-diverse AI agreement before publishing canonical platform state, and a mandatory post-deploy gate.
composing_primitives: Health Check Script scanning 60+ files for stale canonical values (binary PASS/FAIL, runs in 5 seconds)
Five-type hallucination taxonomy: Stats Drift, Premature Declaration, Phantom Wiring, Stale Context Claims, Confirmation Cascade
Dual-synthesis Red Queen protocol: two independent AI architectures must produce field-exact agreement
Trust-No-One Audit dumping all stat references for raw human inspection
Hierarchical Librarian Guild with domain-verified timestamped summaries

title: Adversarial Signal Counter-Vote Civic Engagement System
canonical_topic: System converting unsolicited political communications into formal, identity-verified FOR/AGAINST civic position records within a cooperative membership platform, aggregating them into a non-partisan public record and generating pre-filled representative correspondence via a vote-to-letter pipeline.
composing_primitives: Counter-Vote trigger: unsolicited political message becomes prompt for formal opposing civic position
Verified cooperative membership identity ($5/year, one-person-one-vote) ensuring anti-bot integrity
Non-partisan aggregated position view across all member votes on a bill
Position-to-letter pipeline auto-generating pre-filled representative correspondence
Trigger-source tracking field categorizing engagement origin (unsolicited_text, mailer, ad, organic)

title: The Mnemonic Load
canonical_topic: Formalized, named, repeatable process for loading mission-specific context from the Armory of Information into each Stitchpunk AI agent's context window before task execution, with task-scoped retrieval, mandatory Founder Corrections injection, session continuity, and multi-agent coordination across four heterogeneous agent types.
composing_primitives: Armory of Information as persistent multi-layer storage (Librarian indexes, BISHOP_DROPZONE, memory system, session handoffs)
Task-scoped role selector retrieving relevant context subset before each mission
Founder Corrections injection enforcing canonical numbers, naming rules, and hard boundaries
Session continuity via handoff records and pending work artifacts
Multi-agent coordination: different Mnemonic Loads for Bishop/Knight/Rook/Pawn from same Armory
founder_voice_quotes: This process of having an Armory of Information which is loaded before going into the Matrix, like Neo was loaded up with helicopter and kung fu... is a process we need to name.

title: The Fingertips System
canonical_topic: Self-scaling AI knowledge infrastructure where Librarian instances automatically reproduce using population-proportional representation when data volume crosses the Half Rule threshold, with a five-rank hierarchy from singleton Red Queen adversarial validator through Master Librarian, Staff Librarian, Corps Script, and Invokable Script, all monitored by a Quartermaster.
composing_primitives: Population-proportional scaling: new Librarian instance spawned when domain data exceeds 50% capacity threshold
The Half Rule: always operating below 50% capacity per instance to ensure headroom
Five-rank hierarchy: Red Queen (singleton apex) → Master Librarian → Staff Librarian → Corps Script → Invokable Script
Propagation Cascade: new rank creation triggers full sub-hierarchy auto-generation
Quartermaster scheduling and health-check system monitoring all Corps Scripts and Invokable Scripts
founder_voice_quotes: for every X amount of data spread or data size per category, an additional Corps Librarian is made — kind of like how representatives of states are tied to the populations

title: Crewman #6: Vote-Gated Serial Publishing Engine
canonical_topic: Serialized narrative system ('A Founder's AI Journey') distributed as automated hourly micro-posts across social channels, where each chapter's canonical Cephas publication is gated by audience engagement vote threshold, and the entire pipeline self-documents as a research dataset about its own distribution performance.
composing_primitives: Hourly automated micro-post distribution via Battery Dispatch infrastructure across Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit
Vote-gated chapter escalation: staged Cephas paper publishes only when engagement threshold is crossed
Episode-to-chapter structure with threaded social media posts and vote threshold tracking
Self-documenting research dataset capturing all engagement data for meta-analysis
Demand-Signal Escalation: audience engagement votes content into full canonical existence
founder_voice_quotes: 1000 episodes... every paper is posted just as the first excerpt comes out, and if that is VOTED on to its threshold, then the next paper is published on Cephas

title: Reading Beacon
canonical_topic: Specialized orange beacon subtype saving reading positions with auto-generated human-readable reference codes (e.g., Read001MnL002) stored in a portable Beacon Wallet, bridging physical Deck Card QR scans to persistent digital bookmarks that trigger account creation as the membership conversion mechanism.
composing_primitives: Auto-generated reference code format: Read[BeaconNum][PaperRef][PageNum] (e.g., Read001MnL002)
Beacon Wallet: member's persistent grid/list of all Reading Beacons with progress bars and resume links
Multiple creation triggers: QR scan from Deck Card, manual bookmark, Guided Tour drop, auto-save on navigation
Physical-to-digital bridge converting Deck Card QR into digital Reading Beacon requiring Helm (membership)
Onboarding funnel: Deck Card → Episode in paper → save place → account creation as bookmark persistence
founder_voice_quotes: save their place with a Reading Beacon, which number with Reference and Iteration, so that it autogenerates as the Paper being read BeaconNum-REF-PageNum so in this case it would be Read001MnL002

title: Deck Card Deep-Link Pipeline
canonical_topic: System connecting physical or digital Deck Cards carrying BST episodes via QR deep links to the exact paragraph position of that episode's source passage within the containing Cephas paper, rendering the passage highlighted with surrounding context and initiating a six-step onboarding funnel from card scan to paid membership.
composing_primitives: QR codes encoding deep-link URLs with anchor to specific episode passage (cephas.lianabanyan.org/papers/{slug}#bst-ep-{n})
Highlighted source passage rendering with full paper context visible around it
Six-step onboarding funnel: scan → context → browse → save place → Helm creation → share
Collectible numbered sequential Deck Cards (physical print, digital image, or both)
Card production scale: 94 cards for Chapters 1-2, up to 3,000-5,000 at full BST archive
founder_voice_quotes: publish as Deck Cards so that when you click it or scan the QR code it takes you to where that episode appears in its containing paper — which is an onboarding opportunity, because it shows what else is available

title: Cue Card Interest Signal
canonical_topic: System enabling members to share a Reading Beacon position on their visible Cue Card as a social interest signal, displaying reading progress and type to other members who can follow to the same position and create their own beacon, forming reading cohorts and enabling interest-based network discovery.
composing_primitives: Reading Beacon sharing on member Cue Card as clickable 'Currently Reading / Finished / Recommended' interest signal
Progress visibility: paper title, progress bar percentage, ref code, and 'Read Along' CTA
Reading cohort formation: members at same position discover each other as natural collaboration groups
Explicit privacy controls: member chooses which beacons to share and their visibility scope
Compound network effect: 94+ Deck Cards → N beacons → M signals → P new readers (geometric growth)
founder_voice_quotes: choose IN ADDITION to SEND that Beacon Position on your Own Cue Card — 'Share your interest'

title: Reading Beacon Influencer Bridge
canonical_topic: Attribution system crediting members with Linchpin referral connections and Joule Options when visitors follow their shared Reading Beacon Interest Signals, read to Helm account creation, with one-level-only anti-MLM constraint, full attribution-path self-documentation, and Beacon tier dual-meaning resonance.
composing_primitives: Content-as-referral attribution: member earns Linchpin credit when their shared beacon leads to a new member signup
One-level-only constraint: no downline credit, no MLM structure — direct sharer only
reading_beacon_attributions self-documenting table tracking full conversion path (paper, episode, deck card, signup)
Linchpin tier resonance: Beacon tier members are simultaneously navigation Beacons and Lighthouse influencers
Joule Options (non-purchasable governance units) as organic referral reward for content sharing
founder_voice_quotes: connect that with the influencer program! and all that that implies.

title: Reading Progress Beacon Integration
canonical_topic: Architectural bridge activating the five-innovation Crewman #6 content chain (#2133-#2137) on existing live reading_progress and beacons tables using only junction records and additive payload fields, with zero new core tables, verified engagement signals (coverage minutes + golden keys) backing Cue Card Interest Signals, and universal automatic activation for all Cephas articles.
composing_primitives: Junction records linking reading_progress entries to Reading Beacons via orange_subtype and orange_payload fields (no new core tables)
Live percent_complete sync from reading_progress to Cue Card Interest Signal display
Coverage minutes and golden keys as verified engagement proof on shared beacon signals
Universal Cephas article activation: all content_type='cephas_article' entries automatically participate in full pipeline
Eight-step pipeline with five existing layers (reading_progress, percent, coverage, golden keys, hosting) plus three new (beacon, interest signal, attribution)
founder_voice_quotes: that 2137 needs to be applied to all Cephas articles, which already have a cool % read feature, remember? And their own cue card points...

title: A&A FORMALS BATCH — Innovations #2139-#2148 (Content + Temporal Architecture)
canonical_topic: Batch of ten innovations covering the full cooperative content and temporal scheduling architecture: four-layer depth navigation (Skipping Stones), Pudding atomization (Spoonfuls), concurrent multi-series distribution grid, ten-spice skill taxonomy (Spice Rack), cooperative project matching (Recipe Pot), platform-as-show narrative layer (Bring Popcorn), member-scheduled viewing beacons, shared three-role scheduling primitive, TV Guide content discovery, and temporal architecture distributing scheduling across all user roles.
composing_primitives: Skipping Stones four-layer depth navigation (Stone → Proof is in the Pudding → Pudding → NOT Pudding)
Spoonfuls structured micro-post atomization with S-NNN-MMM numbering and vote-gated Cephas promotion
Concurrent Distribution Grid staggering three content series across six channels with cross-reference tags
The Spice Rack: closed ten-spice culinary taxonomy for content, skills, and project matching
Temporal Content Architecture: shared scheduling primitive distributed across Staff, Creator, and Member roles

title: Skipping Stones Depth Navigation
canonical_topic: Four-layer reading depth system making every first-level section of every academic paper independently discoverable via a physical Deck Card with skipping stone logo and QR code, using 'Proof is in the Pudding / Pudding / This is NOT Pudding' as structural navigation labels through progressive depth tiers tracked by Reading Beacons.
composing_primitives: Four-layer architecture: Skipping Stone (1-sentence hook) → Proof CTA → Pudding article → full academic paper deep-linked to section
Section-level Cue Cards with skipping stone logo distributing each paper section independently
Pudding verbiage system as structural navigation labels (not marketing)
Reading Beacon tracking across all four depth layers with engagement-gated progression
Parallel channels: Skipping Stones (spatial/browse) vs. BST Episodes (temporal/serial) into same reading infrastructure
founder_voice_quotes: break up academic papers into section-level Cue Cards with skipping stone logo, use 'Pudding / This is NOT Pudding / The Proof is in the Pudding' verbiage for depth navigation

title: Spoonfuls Distribution Engine
canonical_topic: Third social media distribution channel extracting 5-8 bounded micro-posts per Pudding article ('A Spoonful of Cephas') with S-NNN-MMM parent-child numbering, vote-gated Cephas promotion on engagement threshold, and deep-link back to source Pudding forming the accessible-layer tier of the three-channel content depth funnel.
composing_primitives: Micro-post extraction: 5-8 Spoonfuls per Pudding article at ~280 chars each, self-contained with deep-link back
S-NNN-MMM numbering scheme (pudding number + sequence) enabling per-unit tracking across channels
Battery Dispatch channel field extension distinguishing bst/spoonfuls/skipping_stones in crewman_episodes table
Vote-gate behavior: Spoonful engagement crossing threshold promotes/publishes full Pudding on Cephas
Three-tier depth funnel: Spoonfuls (accessible) → Pudding article → 'NOT Pudding' academic paper
founder_voice_quotes: all the pudding will be sent out the same way, as limited length media posts, linking back to the papers on cephas

title: Concurrent Distribution Grid
canonical_topic: Multi-series staggered scheduling system running BST Episodes, Spoonfuls, and Skipping Stones concurrently across six social channels with cross-reference tags on every post, per-series/channel/time/content-type engagement data collection, and a self-optimizing recursive feedback loop where distribution metrics write future BST chapter content.
composing_primitives: Staggering rules preventing same-series overlap across channels; peak-hour optimization per platform
Cross-reference system appending active series pointers to every scheduled post across channels
Engagement data collection per post: series, channel, time-slot, day, content-type, cross-ref clicks, beacon creates
Self-optimizing feedback loop: engagement analytics feed back into BST chapter production decisions
Public Viewing Schedule page showing programming grid, series progress, and vote-gate milestone proximity
founder_voice_quotes: run several series concurrently, staggered schedule on ALL social media, Viewing Schedule for multiple series, cross reference each other on other channels, measure time of day and audience and social media response, data feeds back into BST chapters

title: The Spice Rack
canonical_topic: Closed ten-spice culinary taxonomy (Salt/Garlic/Sugar/Cinnamon/Pepper/Ginger/Cumin/Paprika/Basil/Oregano) simultaneously serving as content classification tags, member skill declarations, and cooperative project recipe matching vocabulary, operationalizing the Stone Soup and Little Red Hen fable traditions into a unified business-skill taxonomy.
composing_primitives: Ten spices mapping to ten business skill domains with deliberate culinary metaphor logic (e.g., Garlic=Finance: 'keeps vampires/extractors away')
Dual-purpose taxonomy: every content piece gets 1-3 spice tags; every member declares their spices as skill profile
Audience spice-channel subscriptions enabling personalized content streams from the shared Distribution Grid
Project recipe declarations: 'Need Garlic and Cinnamon' = 'Need accounting and design' (Stone Soup operationalized)
Fixed cardinality of exactly ten spices preventing taxonomy sprawl while enabling multi-dimensional classification
founder_voice_quotes: grade each spoonful — spoonful of salt? sugar? cinnamon? garlic? Each spice taken from a real recipe that matches skills needed for a business to succeed. It hearkens back to Stone Soup and LRH Fable.
